theme_notes: Drawn from SpaceX's historic $75B IPO making Musk the world's first trillionaire, the 2026 FIFA World Cup Round of 16 (USMNT beat Bosnia 2-0, Morocco crushed Canada 3-0), Iran's ongoing war and Khamenei's dayslong state funeral, America's 250th birthday celebrations, and Supreme Court rulings on birthright citizenship and campaign spending.
settled: Musk hit a trillion. You hit zero. Happy July 4th to both of you.
Even. America turned 250. Your debt didn't even make it to one.
Cleared. Khamenei had more on his plate. Yours is clean.
youOwe: Less than a SpaceX share. More than you want to explain.
USMNT scored twice against Bosnia. You can't score a $40 payment.
Musk made this before you finished reading the word 'Musk.'
Birthright citizenship is settled law again. Your tab: less settled.
Morocco beat Canada 3-0. Your debt is beating your dignity by more.
Enough for a World Cup watch party. Instead, you're funding someone's irritation.
Venezuela took two earthquakes and kept moving. You haven't survived one billing cycle.
Not quite a SpaceX IPO share. Quite a lot of shame.
DC launched 850,000 fireworks tonight. This tab launched earlier and hasn't landed.
Iran is burying its Supreme Leader. You're quietly burying your financial credibility.
USA plays Belgium Monday. They have a game plan. You have a debt and no plan.
America's 250 years old and swimming in national debt. You've inherited the spirit.
SpaceX IPO raised $75 billion. You've raised several red flags.
Musk made your entire balance before his first call of the day.
America turns 250 today. This debt will still be here for 251.
Khamenei's funeral runs four days. Your debt has no scheduled end.
World Cup final is July 19. Your debt has no final date.
SpaceX is worth $1.77 trillion. Your net worth: currently debatable.
theyOwe: Under $50. They're treating you like a minor territorial dispute.
Less than a July 4th sparkler pack. And yet: somehow this is where we are.
SpaceX went from private to $1.77 trillion. Your partner went from owing you to still owing you.
185 million Americans are sweating the heat wave. Make your partner sweat the debt.
America fired 850,000 fireworks tonight. You've been holding back. Stop it.
The Supreme Court freed corporations from all spending limits. Not your partner, apparently.
Morocco beat Canada 3-0. Your partner can't even beat a Venmo notification.
$300 in 2026. SpaceX went public. Your partner went silent.
The World Cup's in the Round of 16. Your patience just made the same cut.
Khamenei's gone. Your patience is almost gone. Collect what's owed.
The Supreme Court ruled three times this week. Rule once yourself: collect.
Iran started a war over an airstrike. This started over brunch. Equally justified.
SpaceX cleared $1.77 trillion today. Your partner hasn't cleared four figures.
Musk crossed a trillion. Your partner can't cross a four-figure payment. Disgraceful.
Trump gave a speech for America's 250th. Draft yours: 'Pay me back.'
Musk hit a trillion. Your partner hit five figures owed. Both historic.
The Iran war has no ceasefire. Neither does your patience. Understandable.
Five figures. America's 250th birthday today. The Founders also had debt problems.
